description: Olympic Medal History by Country Development & Sport Category
proposed_title: Olympic Medals by Sex and Season (1896–2016)
encoding_note: Success = Medal is not NA (any medal won); Cases = all athlete-event rows. Treatment = Sex (M/F); Stratum = Season (Summer/Winter). Aggregate to count Successes and Cases per (Sex × Season) cell. Era or Sport can serve as an alternative stratum.
